rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees involving ports, implementation scopes for bindings.
Use assign only for output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope; avoid placing guarantees in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE type declarations use int, real, or bool; align assumed types with actual expression types.
Write guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs; avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in type annexes.
For stateful equations, use initialized temporal recurrence; use nested if-then-else for branching logic.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
Boolean expressions should use AGREE logical operators: and, or, not(...), implication =>.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs.
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for guarantees.
